Academics · CentralHub

AS/A Level Syllabus

Manage chapter and topic structure for all AS/A Level subjects. Attach syllabus objective codes, view teacher progress, and manage class groups.

Back to Academics

Access Restricted

This page is only available to Central Admins.

Class Groups

Define class groups for each subject. Teachers can switch between groups to track progress independently (e.g. 11A vs 11B).

Objective Code Format

Define the objective code prefixes used for each subject. These appear as filter chips in the Teachers Hub Coverage Report (e.g. C1.1).

Used to detect codes like C1.1 in objectives. Leave blank to auto-detect.

Applies to all subjects. Teachers Hub uses this to calculate overdue/behind alerts.

Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics

9709 · Year 11–12

Topics marked done by each teacher for this subject
